title: Quick check: complement and addition rule

questions.text: Events $A$ and $B$ are mutually exclusive with $P(A) = 0.2$ and $P(B) = 0.5$. What is $P(A \cup B)$?
questions.explanation: Mutually exclusive events cannot both occur, so $P(A \cap B) = 0$ and $P(A \cup B) = P(A) + P(B) = 0.2 + 0.5 = 0.7$.
